source_pr.title: *: stabilize integrationtest executor/stale_txn
source_pr.body:
<!--

Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?
<!--

Please create an issue first to describe the problem.

There MUST be one line starting with "Issue Number:  " and
linking the relevant issues via the "close" or "ref".

For more info, check https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/contribute-code.html#referring-to-an-issue.

-->

Issue Number: close #63082

Problem Summary:
- Integration test case `executor/stale_txn` was unstable due to stale-txn output mismatches.

### What changed and how does it work?
- Update the test case and expected result to align with current stale-txn behavior.

### Check List

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- [ ] Unit test
- [x] Integration test
- [ ] Manual test (add detailed scripts or steps below)

Test Details:
- `cd tests/integrationtest && ./run-tests.sh -r executor/stale_txn`
- [ ] No need to test
  > - [ ] I checked and no code files have been changed.
  > <!-- Or your custom  "No need to test" reasons -->

Side effects

- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more CPU
- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more Memory
- [ ] Breaking backward compatibility

Documentation

- [ ] Affects user behaviors
- [ ] Contains syntax changes
- [ ] Contains variable changes
- [ ] Contains experimental features
- [ ] Changes MySQL compatibility

### Release note

<!-- compatibility change, improvement, bugfix, and new feature need a release note -->

Please refer to [Release Notes Language Style Guide](https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/release-notes-style-guide.html) to write a quality release note.

```release-note
None
```

symptoms: 82  Problem Summary: - Integration test case `executor/stale_txn` was unstable due to stale-txn output mismatches.  ### What changed and how does it work? - Update the
failure_signature: 82  Problem Summary: - Integration test case `executor/stale_txn` was unstable due to stale-txn output mismatches.  ### What changed and how does it work? - Update the
root_cause_explanation: The stale transaction integration test used `AS OF TIMESTAMP now()` without a safe buffer, which can become invalid (future or bootstrap-boundary) depending on timing. This PR uses `now(6) - interval 1 microsecond` so the snapshot is deterministically in the past.
